---
name: Bug report
about: Something works incorrectly or crashes
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Screenshots / video

If applicable, drag a screenshot or short screen recording here.

## Environment

- macOS version: (e.g., 14.4 Sonoma)
- Xcode version: `xcodebuild -version`
- Swift version: `swift --version`
- CommitPyramid commit: `git rev-parse --short HEAD`

## Logs

If the bug is reproducible, attach:
- `~/Library/Application Support/CommitPyramid/errors.log` (if exists)
- Relevant lines from `~/Library/Application Support/CommitPyramid/events.jsonl`

## Additional context

Anything else that might be useful — recent settings changes, watcher sources, etc.
